You found the secret tab!

The prize for it is this little fella:

BIO

BIO

I am…

… a fast learner and skilled solution-finder, with interest in research and query languages.
… well-known among coworkers for diligence, attention to detail and talent for finding pesky edge-cases.
… an excellent addition to any team needing a bit of structure and someone down-to-earth.

I work…

… profesionally, in a small, self-managing team of test automation developers, supporting manual testes in covering regression testing.
… personally, solo on small, creative projects used for self-expression and sharing resources with the communities I'm a part of.

I dream…

… of working with documentation maintenance. I enjoy technical writing and sorting data, and feel fulfilled when I can help others with well-kept references and guides.
… of working in game dev, like most gamers. The allure of being a part of creating something you love and are involved in, instead of simply clocking in hours at work, is strong.

EXP

PROJ

PROJECTS

Here's a brief of things I work on in my spare time. As you can see, only some of them are linked. I care deeply about work-life balance as well as cybersecurity. I do not associate my hobby projects with my legal name, and keep my professional matters separate from my private online persona. As such, I won't link to my personal projects from a public website with my government name, but you can ask about them in private!

Public projects

  • calculator for cat food needs
  • this web page!

Hobby projects

  • personal webpage serving as a hub of my online presence
  • curated collection of interesting quotes
  • Youtube channel for my opinions and short video essays
  • transformative prose work
  • set of useful macros for an online gaming platform
  • Obsidian notes for several group storytelling games that I participate in
  • components for fantasy worldbuilding (maps, characters, cultures etc.) shared under CC license
